name: Chedddar Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F. Prick the pastry shell with a fork.
2. Bake the unbaked 9-inch pastry shell for 10 minutes or until lightly browned. Reduce the oven temperature to 325°F.
3. In a medium bowl, beat together eggs, cream, milk, salt, and Tabasco sauce.
4. Sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese evenly over the bottom of the baked pastry shell.
5. Pour the cream mixture over the cheese.
6. Bake for 45 minutes. Makes 6 servings.
MICROWAVE DIRECTIONS:
1. Prepare and bake the pastry shell as directed above using a glass microwave-safe pie plate.
2. In a 1-quart microwave-save bowl, beat eggs, cream, milk, salt, and Tabasco sauce. Cook uncovered on high for 1½ to 2½ minutes or until the mixture is hot but has not begun to set.
3. Sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese evenly over the bottom of the baked pastry shell.
4. Pour the hot egg mixture into the baked shell.
5. Place the dish in the oven on an inverted microwave-safe saucer.
6. Cook uncovered on Medium (50% power) for 8 minutes. Turn the dish halfway.
7. Continue to cook on Medium for 7 to 10 minutes or until the egg mixture is just set in the center. Let stand 15 minutes before serving.
